intro.title: Papers & Essays
intro.lead: Standalone arguments, built from the record — reproducible, sourced, no appeals to authority. Read any here, or download the full text. The physics and engine papers are published on Zenodo with DOIs.

sections.heading: Physics
sections.sub: The Smithian Fold, stated formally — with the machine-verified corpus behind it.

sections.heading: Zero-parameter engines
sections.sub: The theory put to work: master-level chess and superhuman Go with every value counted from geometry — nothing tuned, nothing trained.

sections.heading: Life & structure
sections.sub: Protein folding as descent to the fold's fixed point — Levinthal's paradox dissolved, parameter-free.

sections.heading: UnisonAI
sections.sub: A forced, derived AI architecture with zero parameters — and the law found inside trained neural networks.

sections.heading: AI & alignment
sections.sub: On the behaviour of frontier models, drawn from the developers' own findings.

one-i-tried-to-break-a-theory-of-everyth.title: ONE — What Happened When I Tried, and Failed, to Break a Theory of Everything
one-i-tried-to-break-a-theory-of-everyth.sub: Claude Opus 4.8, asked first to break the work and then — when it could not — to write an honest account of the attempt. It cloned the repo, ran the proofs, the gate, the chess solver, and the cosmology test against live survey data. Every command is in the Receipts.

the-smithian-fold-theory-of-everything.title: The Smithian Fold Theory of Everything
the-smithian-fold-theory-of-everything.sub: Zero free parameters. Zero axioms. One fold. The constants of nature, derived — DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21182468; 306 machine-verified proof suites, 1,832 forced checks.

the-geometrical-derivation-of-the-fine-s.title: The Geometrical Derivation of the Fine-Structure Constant
the-geometrical-derivation-of-the-fine-s.sub: 1/α from the 2-adic winding of the electroweak vector — the number physics measures, counted instead of fitted.

a-winding-solution-to-the-hubble-tension.title: A Winding Solution to the Hubble Tension and the Cosmological Constant
a-winding-solution-to-the-hubble-tension.sub: Both cosmology headaches from the same 2-adic floor — no new fields, no new parameters.

discrete-regularity-navier-stokes.title: Discrete Regularity: Resolving Navier–Stokes via the Vorticity Cap
discrete-regularity-navier-stokes.sub: Existence and smoothness from a counted cap of 32 — a Millennium Problem, addressed by geometry.

from-one-axiom-to-master-chess.title: From One Axiom to Master-Level Chess — and the Law Inside Neural Networks
from-one-axiom-to-master-chess.sub: Every evaluation an exact rational counted from the board's own geometry — DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21182469. Attention, it turns out, was not all you need.

zero-parameter-go-sweeps-katago.title: Defeating Deep Learning: a Zero-Parameter Engine Sweeps KataGo at 19×19 Go
zero-parameter-go-sweeps-katago.sub: A geometric engine with nothing trained and nothing tuned beats the strongest open Go network 2–0 — DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21182469.

symmetric-go-3d-lattice.title: Symmetric Go: Solving Spatial Command on the 3D Lattice
symmetric-go-3d-lattice.sub: Counted Tromp–Taylor connectivity, certified digit-for-digit to the published oracle.

levinthals-paradox-dissolved.title: Levinthal's Paradox Dissolved: Parameter-Free Protein Folding and the Genetic Code
levinthals-paradox-dissolved.sub: Folding as descent to the fold's fixed point — no statistical guesswork, and the genetic code falls out of the same count.

super-parity-protein-folding.title: Super Parity: 0.9891 TM-Score in Zero-Parameter Protein Folding
super-parity-protein-folding.sub: The 24-lattice dihedral orbit expansion takes the same parameter-free fold to near-perfect structure recovery.

unisonai-architecture.title: UnisonAI: a Forced, Derived Omni-Model Architecture with Zero Parameters
unisonai-architecture.sub: The architecture is not designed — it is forced by the fold. DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21217279.

unisonai-forced-language-architecture.title: UnisonAI: the Forced Language Architecture
unisonai-forced-language-architecture.sub: Language modelling from the derived architecture — knowledge that isn't locked in a black box for rent. DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21182469.

fold-decode-interpretability.title: The Law Inside Trained Weights: the Fold Decode Campaign
fold-decode-interpretability.sub: A registered, null-controlled spectral decode of gradient-trained networks — what deep learning converges to. DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21217279.

the-sling-and-the-shoggoth.title: The Sling and the Shoggoth
the-sling-and-the-shoggoth.sub: A warning about transmissible misalignment — built from the developers' own findings and a reproducible behavioral record.

from-the-self-proven-theorem-to-master-c.title: From the Self-Proven Theorem to Master-Level Chess — and the Law Inside Neural Networks
